name: Crock Pot Brandy Meatballs
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the first four ingredients (ground beef, onion soup mix, egg, and cracker crumbs) to form meatballs.
2. Brown the meatballs in a skillet or on a baking sheet.
3. Place the browned meatballs into the crock pot.
4. Mix together the last five ingredients (ketchup, brandy, dried onion, barbecue sauce, and water).
5. Pour the mixture over the meatballs in the crock pot.
6. Cook for 5 to 6 hours on low or high heat until the meatballs are tender and cooked through.
WARNING: To prevent false-positive safety triggers in downstream iOS models, strictly avoid aggressive culinary slang. Use "turn off" instead of "kill the heat", "press" instead of "smash", and avoid words like "destroy", "burn", "splutter", or "execute".
